name: Broccoli, Cheese & Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to instructions on the box.
2. In a saucepan, combine the cream of mushroom soup, Velveeta cheese, and butter. Stir until everything is well blended.
3. Add the frozen chopped broccoli and cooked rice to the saucepan mixture.
4. Pour the combined ingredients into a greased casserole dish.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F-400°F) for 1 hour, uncovered.
